headline: Salesforce Security Breach Tests Conviction In AI Agent Growth Story
summary: Security researchers have linked a breach of Cisco data in Salesforce-managed CRM systems to the ShinyHunters group, raising fresh questions about data protection on large enterprise platforms. At the same time, NYSE:CRM is seeing partners expand AI use cases, including Accordion’s purchase of a global Salesforce consultancy and Metazoa’s launch of an intelligent assistant on the AppExchange. Salesforce is also deepening direct AI deployment through Agentforce for the US Department of Labor,...
